# Hexadecimal character escape sequences (Unicode code points)

\p{M}	u	"(?:ًگ‡½|ًگ‹ |\ud800[\udf76-\udf7a]|\ud802[\ude01-\ude03]|\ud802[\ude05\ude06]|\ud802[\ude0c-\ude0f]|\ud802[\ude38-\ude3a]|ًگ¨؟|\ud802[\udee5\udee6]|\ud803[\udd24-\udd27]|\ud803[\udd69-\udd6d]|\ud803[\udeab\udeac]|\ud803[\udefc-\udeff]|\ud803[\udf46-\udf50]|\ud803[\udf82-\udf85]|\ud804[\udc00-\udc02]|\ud804[\udc38-\udc46]|ً‘پ°|\ud804[\udc73\udc74]|\ud804[\udc7f-\udc82]|\ud804[\udcb0-\udcba]|ً‘ƒ‚|\ud804[\udd00-\udd02]|\ud804[\udd27-\udd34]|\ud804[\udd45\udd46]|ً‘…³|\ud804[\udd80-\udd82]|\ud804[\uddb3-\uddc0]|\ud804[\uddc9-\uddcc]|\ud804[\uddce\uddcf]|\ud804[\ude2c-\ude37]|ً‘ˆ¾|ً‘‰پ|\ud804[\udedf-\udeea]|\ud804[\udf00-\udf03]|\ud804[\udf3b\udf3c]|\ud804[\udf3e-\udf44]|\ud804[\udf47\udf48]|\ud804[\udf4b-\udf4d]|ً‘چ—|\ud804[\udf62\udf63]|\ud804[\udf66-\udf6c]|\ud804[\udf70-\udf74]|\ud804[\udfb8-\udfc0]|ً‘ڈ‚|ً‘ڈ…|\ud804[\udfc7-\udfca]|\ud804[\udfcc-\udfd0]|ً‘ڈ’|\ud804[\udfe1\udfe2]|\ud805[\udc35-\udc46]|ً‘‘‍|\ud805[\udcb0-\udcc3]|\ud805[\uddaf-\uddb5]|\ud805[\uddb8-\uddc0]|\ud805[\udddc\udddd]|\ud805[\ude30-\ude40]|\ud805[\udeab-\udeb7]|\ud805[\udf1d-\udf2b]|\ud806[\udc2c-\udc3a]|\ud806[\udd30-\udd35]|\ud806[\udd37\udd38]|\ud806[\udd3b-\udd3e]|ً‘¥€|\ud806[\udd42\udd43]|\ud806[\uddd1-\uddd7]|\ud806[\uddda-\udde0]|ً‘§¤|\ud806[\ude01-\ude0a]|\ud806[\ude33-\ude39]|\ud806[\ude3b-\ude3e]|ً‘©‡|\ud806[\ude51-\ude5b]|\ud806[\ude8a-\ude99]|\ud807[\udc2f-\udc36]|\ud807[\udc38-\udc3f]|\ud807[\udc92-\udca7]|\ud807[\udca9-\udcb6]|\ud807[\udd31-\udd36]|ً‘´؛|\ud807[\udd3c\udd3d]|\ud807[\udd3f-\udd45]|ً‘µ‡|\ud807[\udd8a-\udd8e]|\ud807[\udd90\udd91]|\ud807[\udd93-\udd97]|\ud807[\udef3-\udef6]|\ud807[\udf00\udf01]|ً‘¼ƒ|\ud807[\udf34-\udf3a]|\ud807[\udf3e-\udf42]|ً‘½ڑ|ً“‘€|\ud80d[\udc47-\udc55]|\ud818[\udd1e-\udd2f]|\ud81a[\udef0-\udef4]|\ud81a[\udf30-\udf36]|ً–½ڈ|\ud81b[\udf51-\udf87]|\ud81b[\udf8f-\udf92]|ً–؟¤|\ud81b[\udff0\udff1]|\ud82f[\udc9d\udc9e]|\ud833[\udf00-\udf2d]|\ud833[\udf30-\udf46]|\ud834[\udd65-\udd69]|\ud834[\udd6d-\udd72]|\ud834[\udd7b-\udd82]|\ud834[\udd85-\udd8b] \p{C}	u	"(?:ًگ€Œ|ًگ€§|ًگ€»|ًگ€¾|\ud800[\udc4e\udc4f]|\ud800[\udc5e-\udc7f]|\ud800[\udcfb-\udcff]|\ud800[\udd03-\udd06]|\ud800[\udd34-\udd36]|ًگ†ڈ|\ud800[\udd9d-\udd9f]|\ud800[\udda1-\uddcf]|\ud800[\uddfe-\ude7f]|\ud800[\ude9d-\ude9f]|\ud800[\uded1-\udedf]|\ud800[\udefc-\udeff]|\ud800[\udf24-\udf2c]|\ud800[\udf4b-\udf4f]|\ud800[\udf7b-\udf7f]|ًگژ‍|\ud800[\udfc4-\udfc7]|\ud800[\udfd6-\udfff]|\ud801[\udc9e\udc9f]|\ud801[\udcaa-\udcaf]|\ud801[\udcd4-\udcd7]|\ud801[\udcfc-\udcff]|\ud801[\udd28-\udd2f]|\ud801[\udd64-\udd6e]|ًگ•»|ًگ–‹|ًگ–“|ًگ––|ًگ–¢|ًگ–²|ًگ–؛|\ud801[\uddbd-\uddbf]|\ud801[\uddf4-\uddff]|\ud801[\udf37-\udf3f]|\ud801[\udf56-\udf5f]|\ud801[\udf68-\udf7f]|ًگ‍†|ًگ‍±|\ud801[\udfbb-\udfff]|\ud802[\udc06\udc07]|ًگ ‰|ًگ ¶|\ud802[\udc39-\udc3b]|\ud802[\udc3d\udc3e]|ًگ،–|\ud802[\udc9f-\udca6]|\ud802[\udcb0-\udcdf]|ًگ£³|\ud802[\udcf6-\udcfa]|\ud802[\udd1c-\udd1e]|\ud802[\udd3a-\udd3e]|\ud802[\udd40-\udd7f]|\ud802[\uddb8-\uddbb]|\ud802[\uddd0\uddd1]|ًگ¨„|\ud802[\ude07-\ude0b]|ًگ¨”|ًگ¨ک|\ud802[\ude36\ude37]|\ud802[\ude3b-\ude3e]|\ud802[\ude49-\ude4f]|\ud802[\ude59-\ude5f]|\ud802[\udea0-\udebf]|\ud802[\udee7-\udeea]|\ud802[\udef7-\udeff]|\ud802[\udf36-\udf38]|\ud802[\udf56\udf57]|\ud802[\udf73-\udf77]|\ud802[\udf92-\udf98]|\ud802[\udf9d-\udfa8]|\ud802[\udfb0-\udfff]|\ud803[\udc49-\udc7f]|\ud803[\udcb3-\udcbf]|\ud803[\udcf3-\udcf9]|\ud803[\udd28-\udd2f]|\ud803[\udd3a-\udd3f]|\ud803[\udd66-\udd68]|\ud803[\udd86-\udd8d]|\ud803[\udd90-\ude5f]|ًگ¹؟|ًگ؛ھ|\ud803[\udeae\udeaf]|\ud803[\udeb2-\udec1]|\ud803[\udec5-\udefb]|\ud803[\udf28-\udf2f]|\ud803[\udf5a-\udf6f]|\ud803[\udf8a-\udfaf]|\ud803[\udfcc-\udfdf]|\ud803[\udff7-\udfff]|\ud804[\udc4e-\udc51]|\ud804[\udc76-\udc7e]|ً‘‚½|\ud804[\udcc3-\udccf]|\ud804[\udce9-\udcef]|\ud804[\udcfa-\udcff]|ً‘„µ|\ud804[\udd48-\udd4f]|\ud804[\udd77-\udd7f]|ً‘‡ |\ud804[\uddf5-\uddff]|ً‘ˆ’|\ud804[\ude42-\ude7f]|ً‘ٹ‡|ً‘ٹ‰|ً‘ٹژ|ً‘ٹ‍|\ud804[\udeaa-\udeaf]|\ud804[\udeeb-\udeef]|\ud804[\udefa-\udeff]|ً‘Œ„|\ud804[\udf0d\udf0e]|\ud804[\udf11\udf12]|ً‘Œ©|ً‘ (?=){1}x		(?=){1}x	xxyx	[{"captures":["x"],"index":0},{"captures":["x"],"index":1},{"captures":["x"],"index":3}]
(?=){1,}x		(?=){1,}x	xxyx	[{"captures":["x"],"index":0},{"captures":["x"],"index":1},{"captures":["x"],"index":3}]
(?=){1,2}x		(?=){1,2}x	xxyx	[{"captures":["x"],"index":0},{"captures":["x"],"index":1},{"captures":["x"],"index":3}]
(?=)??x		(?=)??x	xxyx	[{"captures":["x"],"index":0},{"captures":["x"],"index":1},{"captures":["x"],"index":3}]
(?=)*?x		(?=)*?x	xxyx	[{"captures":["x"],"index":0},{"captures":["x"],"index":1},{"captures":["x"],"index":3}]
(?=)+?x		(?=)+?x	xxyx	[{"captures":["x"],"index":0},{"captures":["x"],"index":1},{"captures":["x"],"index":3}]
(?=){1}?x		(?=){1}?x	xxyx	[{"captures":["x"],"index":0},{"captures":["x"],"index":1},{"captures":["x"],"index":3}]
(?=){1,}?x		(?=){1,}?x	xxyx	[{"captures":["x"],"index":0},{"captures":["x"],"index":1},{"captures":["x"],"index":3}]
(?=){1,2}?x		(?=){1,2}?x	xxyx	[{"captures":["x"],"index":0},{"captures":["x"],"index":1},{"captures":["x"],"index":3}]
(?=)*x	u	)syntax-error(	xxyx	"Invalid quantifier"
(?=)*x	v	)syntax-error(	xxyx	"Invalid quantifier"
(?=){1,}x	u	)syntax-error(	xxyx	"Invalid quantifier"
(?=){1,}x	v	)syntax-error(	xxyx	"Invalid quantifier"

(?!)?x		(?!)?x	xxyx	[{"captures":["x"],"index":0},{"captures":["x"],"index":1},{"captures":["x"],"index":3}]
(?!)*x		(?!)*x	xxyx	[{"captures":["x"],"index":0},{"captures":["x"],"index":1},{"captures":["x"],"index":3}]
(?!)+x		(?!)+x	xxyx	[]
(?!){1}x		(?!){1}x	xxyx	[]
(?!){1,}x		(?!){1,}x	xxyx	[]
(?!){1,2}x		(?!){1,2}x	xxyx	[]
(?!)??x		(?!)??x	xxyx	[{"captures":["x"],"index":0},{"captures":["x"],"index":1},{"captures":["x"],"index":3}]
(?!)*?x		(?!)*?x	xxyx	[{"captures":["x"],"index":0},{"captures":["x"],"index":1},{"captures":["x"],"index":3}]
(?!)+?x		(?!)+?x	xxyx	[]
(?!){1}?x		(?!){1}?x	xxyx	[]
(?!){1,}?x		(?!){1,}?x	xxyx	[]
(?!){1,2}?x		(?!){1,2}?x	xxyx	[]
(?!)+x	u	)syntax-error(	xxyx	"Invalid quantifier"
(?!)+x	v	)syntax-error(	xxyx	"Invalid quantifier"
(?!){1,2}x	u	)syntax-error(	xxyx	"Invalid quantifier"
(?!){1,2}x	v	)syntax-error(	xxyx	"Invalid quantifier"

# Lookbehind assertions

(?<=([ab]+)([bc]+))$		"(?<=([ab]+)([bc]+))\\z"	abc	[{"captures":["","a","bc"],"index":3}]
(?<=([ab]+)([bc]+))$	u	"(?<=((?:[\\x61\\x62])+)((?:[\\x62\\x63])+))\\z"	abc	[{"captures":["","a","bc"],"index":3}]
(?<=([ab]+)([bc]+))$	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[{"captures":["","a","bc"],"index":3}]

(?<=\$)\d+(?:\.\d*)?		"(?<=\\$)\\d+(?:\\.\\d*)?"	$10.53	[{"captures":["10.53"],"index":1}]
(?<=\$)\d+(?:\.\d*)?	u	"(?<=\\$)\\d+(?:\\.\\d*)?"	$10.53	[{"captures":["10.53"],"index":1}]
(?<=\$)\d+(?:\.\d*)?	v	)inconvertible(	$10.53	[{"captures":["10.53"],"index":1}]
(?<=\$)\d+(?:\.\d*)?		"(?<=\\$)\\d+(?:\\.\\d*)?"	10.53	[]
(?<=\$)\d+(?:\.\d*)?	u	"(?<=\\$)\\d+(?:\\.\\d*)?"	10.53	[]
(?<=\$)\d+(?:\.\d*)?	v	)inconvertible(	10.53	[]

(?<=\b20)\d{2}\b		"(?<=\\b20)\\d{2}\\b"	2010 1999 1861 2140 2009	[{"captures":["10"],"index":2},{"captures":["09"],"index":22}]
(?<=\b20)\d{2}\b	u	"(?<=\\b20)\\d{2}\\b"	2010 1999 1861 2140 2009	[{"captures":["10"],"index":2},{"captures":["09"],"index":22}]
(?<=\b20)\d{2}\b	v	)inconvertible(	2010 1999 1861 2140 2009	[{"captures":["10"],"index":2},{"captures":["09"],"index":22}]

(?<!(Saturday|Sunday) )\b\w+ \d{1,2}, \d{4}\b		"(?<!(Saturday|Sunday) )\\b[\\d\\x41-\\x5A\\x5F\\x61-\\x7A]+ \\d{1,2}, \\d{4}\\b"	Monday February 1, 2010	[{"captures":["February 1, 2010",null],"index":7}]
(?<!(Saturday|Sunday) )\b\w+ \d{1,2}, \d{4}\b	u	"(?<!(Saturday|Sunday) )\\b[\\d\\x41-\\x5A\\x5F\\x61-\\x7A]+ \\d{1,2}, \\d{4}\\b"	Monday February 1, 2010	[{"captures":["February 1, 2010",null],"index":7}]
(?<!(Saturday|Sunday) )\b\w+ \d{1,2}, \d{4}\b	v	)inconvertible(	Monday February 1, 2010	[{"captures":["February 1, 2010",null],"index":7}]
(?<!(Saturday|Sunday) )\b\w+ \d{1,2}, \d{4}\b		"(?<!(Saturday|Sunday) )\\b[\\d\\x41-\\x5A\\x5F\\x61-\\x7A]+ \\d{1,2}, \\d{4}\\b"	Saturday February 6, 2010	[]
(?<!(Saturday|Sunday) )\b\w+ \d{1,2}, \d{4}\b	u	"(?<!(Saturday|Sunday) )\\b[\\d\\x41-\\x5A\\x5F\\x61-\\x7A]+ \\d{1,2}, \\d{4}\\b"	Saturday February 6, 2010	[]
(?<!(Saturday|Sunday) )\b\w+ \d{1,2}, \d{4}\b	v	)inconvertible(	Saturday February 6, 2010	[]
(?<!(Saturday|Sunday) )\b\w+ \d{1,2}, \d{4}\b		"(?<!(Saturday|Sunday) )\\b[\\d\\x41-\\x5A\\x5F\\x61-\\x7A]+ \\d{1,2}, \\d{4}\\b"	Sunday February 7, 2010	[]
(?<!(Saturday|Sunday) )\b\w+ \d{1,2}, \d{4}\b	u	"(?<!(Saturday|Sunday) )\\b[\\d\\x41-\\x5A\\x5F\\x61-\\x7A]+ \\d{1,2}, \\d{4}\\b"	Sunday February 7, 2010	[]
(?<!(Saturday|Sunday) )\b\w+ \d{1,2}, \d{4}\b	v	)inconvertible(	Sunday February 7, 2010	[]

(?<=)??x		)syntax-error(	xxyx	"Invalid quantifier"
(?<=)??x	u	)syntax-error(	xxyx	"Invalid quantifier"
(?<=)??x	v	)syntax-error(	xxyx	"Invalid quantifier"
(?<=){1}?x		)syntax-error(	xxyx	"Invalid quantifier"
(?<=){1}?x	u	)syntax-error(	xxyx	"Invalid quantifier"
(?<=){1}?x	v	)syntax-error(	xxyx	"Invalid quantifier"

(?<!)*?x		)syntax-error(	xxyx	"Invalid quantifier"
(?<!)*?x	u	)syntax-error(	xxyx	"Invalid quantifier"
(?<!)*?x	v	)syntax-error(	xxyx	"Invalid quantifier"
(?<!){1}?x		)syntax-error(	xxyx	"Invalid quantifier"
(?<!){1}?x	u	)syntax-error(	xxyx	"Invalid quantifier"
(?<!){1}?x	v	)syntax-error(	xxyx	"Invalid quantifier"


# RegExp modifiers ((?ims-ims:pattern))

## Basic ignoreCase modifier
(?i:abc)		(?i:abc)	ABC	[{"captures":["ABC"],"index":0}]
(?i:abc)		(?i:abc)	abc	[{"captures":["abc"],"index":0}]
(?i:abc)		(?i:abc)	AbC	[{"captures":["AbC"],"index":0}]
(?i:abc)?		(?i:abc)?	ABC	[{"captures":["ABC"],"index":0},{"captures":[""],"index":3}]
(?i:abc)?		(?i:abc)?	abc	[{"captures":["abc"],"index":0},{"captures":[""],"index":3}]
(?i:abc)?		(?i:abc)?	AbC	[{"captures":["AbC"],"index":0},{"captures":[""],"index":3}]
(?i:abc)	u	(?i:abc)	ABC	[{"captures":["ABC"],"index":0}]
(?i:abc)	v	)inconvertible(	ABC	[{"captures":["ABC"],"index":0}]
(?i:abc)	u	(?i:abc)	abc	[{"captures":["abc"],"index":0}]
(?i:abc)	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[{"captures":["abc"],"index":0}]

## Basic multiline modifier
(?m:^a)		"(?:(?<=[\n\r\u2028\u2029]|^)a)"	"b\na"	[{"captures":["a"],"index":2}]
(?m:a$)		"(?:a(?=[\n\r\u2028\u2029]|\\z))"	"a\nb"	[{"captures":["a"],"index":0}]
(?m:^a$)		"(?:(?<=[\n\r\u2028\u2029]|^)a(?=[\n\r\u2028\u2029]|\\z))"	"b\na\nb"	[{"captures":["a"],"index":2}]

## Basic dotAll modifier
(?s:.)		"(?:[\\s\\S])"	"\n"	[{"captures":["\n"],"index":0}]
(?s:.)		"(?:[\\s\\S])"	a	[{"captures":["a"],"index":0}]
(?s:.)		"(?:[\\s\\S])"	"\r"	[{"captures":["\r"],"index":0}]

## Remove modifiers
(?-i:abc)	i	(?-i:abc)	abc	[{"captures":["abc"],"index":0}]
(?-i:abc)	i	(?-i:abc)	ABC	[]
(?-s:.)	s	"(?:[^\n\r\u2028\u2029])"	a	[{"captures":["a"],"index":0}]
(?-s:.)	s	"(?:[^\n\r\u2028\u2029])"	"\n"	[]
(?-m:^a)	m	(?:^a)	"b\na"	[]
(?-m:^a)	m	(?:^a)	a	[{"captures":["a"],"index":0}]

## Combined add modifiers
(?im:^abc)		"(?i:(?<=[\n\r\u2028\u2029]|^)abc)"	"b\nabc"	[{"captures":["abc"],"index":2}]
(?im:^abc)		"(?i:(?<=[\n\r\u2028\u2029]|^)abc)"	"b\nABC"	[{"captures":["ABC"],"index":2}]
(?is:.abc)		"(?i:[\\s\\S]abc)"	"\nabc"	[{"captures":["\nabc"],"index":0}]
(?is:.abc)		"(?i:[\\s\\S]abc)"	"\nABC"	[{"captures":["\nABC"],"index":0}]
(?ims:^.a)		"(?i:(?<=[\n\r\u2028\u2029]|^)[\\s\\S]a)"	"b\n\na"	[{"captures":["\na"],"index":2}]

## Add + remove modifiers
(?i-m:^abc)	m	(?i:^abc)	abc	[{"captures":["abc"],"index":0}]
(?i-m:^abc)	m	(?i:^abc)	ABC	[{"captures":["ABC"],"index":0}]
(?i-m:^abc)	m	(?i:^abc)	"b\nabc"	[]
(?m-i:^abc)	i	"(?-i:(?<=[\n\r\u2028\u2029]|^)abc)"	"b\nabc"	[{"captures":["abc"],"index":2}]
(?m-i:^abc)	i	"(?-i:(?<=[\n\r\u2028\u2029]|^)abc)"	"b\nABC"	[]

## Empty remove syntax
(?s-:.)		"(?:[\\s\\S])"	"\n"	[{"captures":["\n"],"index":0}]
(?s-:.)		"(?:[\\s\\S])"	a	[{"captures":["a"],"index":0}]
(?m-:^a)		"(?:(?<=[\n\r\u2028\u2029]|^)a)"	"b\na"	[{"captures":["a"],"index":2}]

## Scoping â€” modifier only applies inside group
a(?i:b)c		a(?i:b)c	aBc	[{"captures":["aBc"],"index":0}]
a(?i:b)c		a(?i:b)c	ABc	[]
a(?i:b)c		a(?i:b)c	aBC	[]
a(?i:b)c		a(?i:b)c	abc	[{"captures":["abc"],"index":0}]

## Nested modifier groups
(?s:(?-s:.).)		"(?:(?:[^\n\r\u2028\u2029])[\\s\\S])"	"a\n"	[{"captures":["a\n"],"index":0}]
(?s:(?-s:.).)		"(?:(?:[^\n\r\u2028\u2029])[\\s\\S])"	"\n\n"	[]
(?i:(?-i:a)b)		(?i:(?-i:a)b)	aB	[{"captures":["aB"],"index":0}]
(?i:(?-i:a)b)		(?i:(?-i:a)b)	AB	[]
(?i:(?-i:a)b)		(?i:(?-i:a)b)	ab	[{"captures":["ab"],"index":0}]

## Quantifier after modifier group
(?i:a)+		(?i:a)+	aAaA	[{"captures":["aAaA"],"index":0}]
(?s:.){2}		"(?:[\\s\\S]){2}"	"a\n"	[{"captures":["a\n"],"index":0}]
(?i:a)*		(?i:a)*	aA	[{"captures":["aA"],"index":0},{"captures":[""],"index":2}]

## Alternation inside modifier group
(?i:a|B)		(?i:a|B)	a	[{"captures":["a"],"index":0}]
(?i:a|B)		(?i:a|B)	b	[{"captures":["b"],"index":0}]
(?i:a|B)		(?i:a|B)	A	[{"captures":["A"],"index":0}]
(?i:a|B)		(?i:a|B)	B	[{"captures":["B"],"index":0}]

## Capturing group inside modifier group
(?i:(a)b)		(?i:(a)b)	AB	[{"captures":["AB","A"],"index":0}]

# With u flag
(?i:abc)	u	(?i:abc)	AbC	[{"captures":["AbC"],"index":0}]
(?i:abc)	v	)inconvertible(	AbC	[{"captures":["AbC"],"index":0}]
(?s:.)	u	"(?:(?:[\ud800-\udbff][\udc00-\udfff]|[\ud800-\udbff](?![\udc00-\udfff])|(?<![\ud800-\udbff])[\udc00-\udfff]|[^\ud800-\udfff]))"	"\n"	[{"captures":["\n"],"index":0}]
(?s:.)	v	)inconvertible(	"\n"	[{"captures":["\n"],"index":0}]
(?m:^a)	u	"(?:(?<=[\n\r\u2028\u2029]|^)a)"	"b\na"	[{"captures":["a"],"index":2}]
(?m:^a)	v	)inconvertible(	"b\na"	[{"captures":["a"],"index":2}]

## Error cases (these should produce syntax errors)
(?S:a)		)syntax-error(	a	"Invalid group"
(?sz:a)		)syntax-error(	a	"Invalid group"
(?ii:a)		)syntax-error(	a	"Repeated flag in flag group"
(?i-i:a)		)syntax-error(	a	"Repeated flag in flag group"
(?i-s-i:a)		)syntax-error(	a	"Multiple dashes in flag group"
(?-:a)		)syntax-error(	a	"Invalid flag group"
(?I:a)		)syntax-error(	a	"Invalid group"
(?1:a)		)syntax-error(	a	"Invalid group"
(?-S:a)		)syntax-error(	a	"Invalid group"
(?-sz:a)		)syntax-error(	a	"Invalid group"
(?-ss:a)		)syntax-error(	a	"Repeated flag in flag group"
(?mm:a)		)syntax-error(	a	"Repeated flag in flag group"

## Sequential modifier groups
(?i:a)(?s:.)		"(?i:a)(?:[\\s\\S])"	"A\n"	[{"captures":["A\n"],"index":0}]
(?i:a)b		(?i:a)b	Ab	[{"captures":["Ab"],"index":0}]

## Empty content modifier groups
(?i:)		(?i:)	a	[{"captures":[""],"index":0},{"captures":[""],"index":1}]
(?s:)		(?:)	a	[{"captures":[""],"index":0},{"captures":[""],"index":1}]
(?m:)		(?:)	a	[{"captures":[""],"index":0},{"captures":[""],"index":1}]

# Flag v

## Class set syntax characters (most of these are already tested above)

[|]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character in character class"

## Class set reserved double punctuators

[&&]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[!!]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[##]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[$$]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[%%]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[**]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[++]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[,,]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[..]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[::]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[;;]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[<<]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[==]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[>>]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[??]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[@@]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[^^^]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[x^^]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[``]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[~~]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"

[\q{&&}]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[\q{!!}]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[\q{##}]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"

## Class set reserved punctuators

[\&\-\!\#\%\,\:\;\<\=\>\@\`\~]	v	)inconvertible(	&-!#%,:;<=>@`~	[{"captures":["&"],"index":0},{"captures":["-"],"index":1},{"captures":["!"],"index":2},{"captures":["#"],"index":3},{"captures":["%"],"index":4},{"captures":[","],"index":5},{"captures":[":"],"index":6},{"captures":[";"],"index":7},{"captures":["<"],"index":8},{"captures":["="],"index":9},{"captures":[">"],"index":10},{"captures":["@"],"index":11},{"captures":["`"],"index":12},{"captures":["~"],"index":13}]

[\0-\#]	v	)inconvertible(	0#	[{"captures":["#"],"index":1}]
[\#-\0]	v	)syntax-error(	0#	"Range out of order in character class"

## Class set expression edge cases

[x&&[]	v	)syntax-error(		"Unterminated character class"
[x--[]	v	)syntax-error(		"Unterminated character class"

[a-]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character in character class"
[a-0]	v	)syntax-error(		"Range out of order in character class"

[a-\k]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid escape"
[a-\q{]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character in character class"
[a-\q{}]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[a-[]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"	!ignore-error-message
[a-[]]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[a-/]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character in character class"

[a--\k]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid escape"

[[]-]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[[]-0]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[[]-\0]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[[]-\d]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[[]-\k]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[[]-\q{]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[[]-\q{}]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[[]-[]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"	!ignore-error-message
[[]-[]]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[[]-/]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[[]-b-c]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[[]-&&]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[[]-##]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[[]--]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character in character class"
[[]---]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character in character class"
[[]--b-]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[[]--b-c]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[[]--b--]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character in character class"
[[]--b---]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character in character class"
[[]--b&&c]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[[]--b##c]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[[]--##]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[[]--\k]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid escape"
[[]&&b&]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[[]&&b&c]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[[]&&b&&]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character in character class"
[[]&&b&&&]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character in character class"
[[]&&b--c]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[[]&&b##c]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[[]&&##]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[[]&&\k]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid escape"
[[]##]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"

[z[]-]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[z[]-0]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[z[]-\0]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[z[]-\d]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[z[]-\k]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[z[]-\q{]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[z[]-\q{}]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[z[]-[]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"	!ignore-error-message
[z[]-[]]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[z[]-/]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[z[]-b-c]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[z[]-&&]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[z[]-##]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid character class"
[z[]--]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[z[]---]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[z[]--b-]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[z[]--b-c]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[z[]--b--]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[z[]--b---]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[z[]--b&&c]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[z[]--b##c]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[z[]--##]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[z[]--\k]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[z[]&&b&]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[z[]&&b&c]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[z[]&&b&&]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[z[]&&b&&&]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[z[]&&b--c]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[z[]&&b##c]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[z[]&&##]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[z[]&&\k]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"
[z[]##]	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid set operation in character class"

## Class set disjunction edge cases

\q	v	)syntax-error(	q	"Invalid escape"
\q{	v	)syntax-error(	q{	"Invalid escape"	!ignore-error-message
\q{}	v	)syntax-error(	\q{}	"Invalid escape"

[\q]	v	)syntax-error(	[q]	"Invalid escape"
[\q{]	v	)syntax-error(	[q{]	"Invalid character in character class"
[\q{}]	v	)inconvertible(	 	[{"captures":[""],"index":0},{"captures":[""],"index":1}]
[\q{ }]	v	)inconvertible(	 	[{"captures":[" "],"index":0}]
[\q{|}]	v	)inconvertible(	  	[{"captures":[""],"index":0},{"captures":[""],"index":1},{"captures":[""],"index":2}]
[\q{ | }]	v	)inconvertible(	  	[{"captures":[" "],"index":0},{"captures":[" "],"index":1}]
[\q{-}]	v	)syntax-error(	-	"Invalid character in character class"
[\q{--}]	v	)syntax-error(	--	"Invalid character in character class"
[\q{&}]	v	)inconvertible(	&	[{"captures":["&"],"index":0}]
[\q{&&}]	v	)syntax-error(	&&	"Invalid set operation in character class"
[\q{#}]	v	)inconvertible(	##	[{"captures":["#"],"index":0},{"captures":["#"],"index":1}]
[\q{##}]	v	)syntax-error(	##	"Invalid set operation in character class"
[\q{/}]	v	)syntax-error(	//	"Invalid character in character class"
[\q{\}]	v	)syntax-error(	\\	"Invalid character in character class"
[\q{\0}]	v	)inconvertible(	0	[]
[\q{\d}]	v	)syntax-error(	0	"Invalid escape"
[\q{\p{Sc}}]	v	)syntax-error(	0	"Invalid escape"
[\q{\q{0}}]	v	)syntax-error(	0	"Invalid escape"

[^\q{}]	v	)syntax-error(	abc	"Negated character class may contain strings"
[^\q{a}]	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[{"captures":["b"],"index":1},{"captures":["c"],"index":2}]
[^\q{ab|c}]	v	)syntax-error(	abc	"Negated character class may contain strings"
[^\q{a|b|c}]	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]

[[^\q{}]]	v	)syntax-error(	abc	"Negated character class may contain strings"
[[^\q{a}]]	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[{"captures":["b"],"index":1},{"captures":["c"],"index":2}]
[[^\q{ab|c}]]	v	)syntax-error(	abc	"Negated character class may contain strings"
[[^\q{a|b|c}]]	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]

/[^\q{a}--\q{a}]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]
/[^\q{a}--\q{ab}]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]
/[^\q{ab}--\q{ab}]/v	v	)syntax-error(	abc	"Negated character class may contain strings"
/[^\q{ab}--\q{a}]/v	v	)syntax-error(	abc	"Negated character class may contain strings"
/[^\q{ab|c}--\q{ab}]/v	v	)syntax-error(	abc	"Negated character class may contain strings"
/[^\q{a|b|c}--\q{ab}]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]

/[^[\q{a}]--[\q{a}]]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]
/[^[\q{a}]--[\q{ab}]]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]
/[^[\q{ab}]--[\q{ab}]]/v	v	)syntax-error(	abc	"Negated character class may contain strings"
/[^[\q{ab}]--[\q{a}]]/v	v	)syntax-error(	abc	"Negated character class may contain strings"
/[^[\q{ab|c}]--[\q{ab}]]/v	v	)syntax-error(	abc	"Negated character class may contain strings"
/[^[\q{a|b|c}]--[\q{ab}]]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]

/[^\q{a}&&\q{a}]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]
/[^\q{a}&&\q{ab}]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]
/[^\q{ab}&&\q{ab}]/v	v	)syntax-error(	abc	"Negated character class may contain strings"
/[^\q{ab}&&\q{a}]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]
/[^\q{ab|c}&&\q{ab}]/v	v	)syntax-error(	abc	"Negated character class may contain strings"
/[^\q{a|b|c}&&\q{ab}]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]

/[^[\q{a}]&&[\q{a}]]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]
/[^[\q{a}]&&[\q{ab}]]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]
/[^[\q{ab}]&&[\q{ab}]]/v	v	)syntax-error(	abc	"Negated character class may contain strings"
/[^[\q{ab}]&&[\q{a}]]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]
/[^[\q{ab|c}]&&[\q{ab}]]/v	v	)syntax-error(	abc	"Negated character class may contain strings"
/[^[\q{a|b|c}]&&[\q{ab}]]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]

/[^\q{a}--[\q{b}--[\q{c}]]]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]
/[^\q{ab|c}--[\q{ab}--[\q{c}]]]/v	v	)syntax-error(	abc	"Negated character class may contain strings"
/[^\q{a|b|c}--[\q{ab}--[\q{c}]]]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]

/[^\q{a}--[\q{b}&&[\q{c}]]]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]
/[^\q{ab|c}--[\q{ab}&&[\q{c}]]]/v	v	)syntax-error(	abc	"Negated character class may contain strings"
/[^\q{a|b|c}--[\q{ab}&&[\q{c}]]]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]

/[^\q{a}&&[\q{b}--[\q{c}]]]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]
/[^\q{ab|c}&&[\q{ab}--[\q{c}]]]/v	v	)syntax-error(	abc	"Negated character class may contain strings"
/[^\q{a|b|c}&&[\q{ab}--[\q{c}]]]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]

/[^\q{a}&&[\q{b}&&[\q{c}]]]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]
/[^\q{ab|c}&&[\q{ab}&&[\q{c}]]]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]
/[^\q{a|b|c}&&[\q{ab}&&[\q{c}]]]/v	v	)inconvertible(	abc	[]

# Class set success cases

[a\\-b]	v	)inconvertible(	abc123	[{"captures":["a"],"index":0},{"captures":["b"],"index":1}]

[a&&b]	v	)inconvertible(	abc123	[]
[a--b]	v	)inconvertible(	abc123	[{"captures":["a"],"index":0}]
[[a-z]&&[aeiou]]	v	)inconvertible(	abc123	[{"captures":["a"],"index":0}]
[[a-z]--[aeiou]]	v	)inconvertible(	abc123	[{"captures":["b"],"index":1},{"captures":["c"],"index":2}]
[[a-f][0-9]]	v	)inconvertible(	abc123	[{"captures":["a"],"index":0},{"captures":["b"],"index":1},{"captures":["c"],"index":2},{"captures":["1"],"index":3},{"captures":["2"],"index":4},{"captures":["3"],"index":5}]
[[[a-f]--[b]][0-9]]	v	)inconvertible(	abc123	[{"captures":["a"],"index":0},{"captures":["c"],"index":2},{"captures":["1"],"index":3},{"captures":["2"],"index":4},{"captures":["3"],"index":5}]
[\p{Decimal_Number}&&[0-9]]	v	)inconvertible(	abc123	[{"captures":["1"],"index":3},{"captures":["2"],"index":4},{"captures":["3"],"index":5}]


[\q{a}]	v	)inconvertible(	abc123	[{"captures":["a"],"index":0}]
[\q{a|}]	v	)inconvertible(	abc123	[{"captures":["a"],"index":0},{"captures":[""],"index":1},{"captures":[""],"index":2},{"captures":[""],"index":3},{"captures":[""],"index":4},{"captures":[""],"index":5},{"captures":[""],"index":6}]
[\q{|a}]	v	)inconvertible(	abc123	[{"captures":["a"],"index":0},{"captures":[""],"index":1},{"captures":[""],"index":2},{"captures":[""],"index":3},{"captures":[""],"index":4},{"captures":[""],"index":5},{"captures":[""],"index":6}]
[\q{abc|def}]	v	)inconvertible(	abc123	[{"captures":["abc"],"index":0}]
[\q{abc|d|ef}]	v	)inconvertible(	abc123	[{"captures":["abc"],"index":0}]

# Issues

## https://github.com/sebastienros/esprima-dotnet/issues/358

^[\\d--\\d]+$		)syntax-error(	012abc	"Range out of order in character class"
^[\\d--\\d]+$	u	)syntax-error(	012abc	"Range out of order in character class"
^[\\d--\\d]+$	v	)syntax-error(	012abc	"Invalid set operation in character class"

^[\d--\d]+$		"^[\\d\\x2D\\x2D\\d]+\\z"	012abc	[]
^[\d--\d]+$	u	)syntax-error(	012abc	"Invalid character class"
^[\d--\d]+$	v	)inconvertible(	012abc	[]

## https://github.com/sebastienros/esprima-dotnet/issues/371

\<sub>		<sub>		[]
\<sub>	u	)syntax-error(		"Invalid escape"
\<sub>	v	)syntax-error(		"Invalid escape"

\<sub>		<sub>	<a><sub></sub></a>	[{"captures":["<sub>"],"index":3}]
\<sub>	u	)syntax-error(	<a><sub></sub></a>	"Invalid escape"
\<sub>	v	)syntax-error(	<a><sub></sub></a>	"Invalid escape"

## https://github.com/sebastienros/jint/issues/506

[^]?(:[rp][el]a[\w-]+)[^]		"[\\s\\S]?(:[rp][el]a[\\d\\x41-\\x5A\\x5F\\x61-\\x7A-]+)[\\s\\S]"	:reagent-	[{"captures":[":reagent-",":reagent"],"index":0}]
[^]?(:[rp][el]a[\w-]+)[^]	u	"(?:[\ud800-\udbff][\udc00-\udfff]|[\ud800-\udbff](?![\udc00-\udfff])|(?<![\ud800-\udbff])[\udc00-\udfff]|[^\ud800-\udfff])?(:(?:[\\x70\\x72])(?:[\\x65\\x6C])a(?:[\\x2D\\x30-\\x39\\x41-\\x5A\\x5F\\x61-\\x7A])+)(?:[\ud800-\udbff][\udc00-\udfff]|[\ud800-\udbff](?![\udc00-\udfff])|(?<![\ud800-\udbff])[\udc00-\udfff]|[^\ud800-\udfff])"	:reagent-	[{"captures":[":reagent-",":reagent"],"index":0}]
[^]?(:[rp][el]a[\w-]+)[^]	v	)syntax-error(	:reagent-	"Invalid character class"

[^]?(:[rp][el]a[\w-]+)[^]		"[\\s\\S]?(:[rp][el]a[\\d\\x41-\\x5A\\x5F\\x61-\\x7A-]+)[\\s\\S]"	xx:reagent-1/y	[{"captures":["x:reagent-1/",":reagent-1"],"index":1}]
[^]?(:[rp][el]a[\w-]+)[^]	u	"(?:[\ud800-\udbff][\udc00-\udfff]|[\ud800-\udbff](?![\udc00-\udfff])|(?<![\ud800-\udbff])[\udc00-\udfff]|[^\ud800-\udfff])?(:(?:[\\x70\\x72])(?:[\\x65\\x6C])a(?:[\\x2D\\x30-\\x39\\x41-\\x5A\\x5F\\x61-\\x7A])+)(?:[\ud800-\udbff][\udc00-\udfff]|[\ud800-\udbff](?![\udc00-\udfff])|(?<![\ud800-\udbff])[\udc00-\udfff]|[^\ud800-\udfff])"	xx:reagent-1/y	[{"captures":["x:reagent-1/",":reagent-1"],"index":1}]
[^]?(:[rp][el]a[\w-]+)[^]	v	)syntax-error(	xx:reagent-1/y	"Invalid character class"
